form.formComment: Second-up here following a spell. Game effort when 2nd (Fr3) over 1650m at this track beaten 9 m by Bettorsweetvictory (1:59.10) in NR up to 40 on March 25 at $23. Draws well so include.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Second-up here following a spell. Game effort when 2nd (Fr3) over 1650m at this track beaten 9 m by Bettorsweetvictory (1:59.10) in NR up to 40 on March 25 at $23. Draws well so include.

form.formComment: Fair performance when beaten by 5.5 m finishing second behind Dot Ball at Echuca over 1755m in a NR up to 36 on March 10 at $1.55. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4 m finishing third after being driven well back, behind Shiralee at Kilmore over 2180m in a NR 36 to 40 on April 2 at $6.50. Has a low draw and should go well again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped during the score up and was out of position as the start was effected.
Hung in and contacted marker pegs before using the sprint lane.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr3) over 2240m at Swan Hill, beaten 22 m by Ozzie Pearl (2:45.60) in 0-1 WIN on March 31 at $23. Two runs back 2nd (Fr3) over 1650m at this track, beaten a neck by Fake Cullection (1:59.30) in NR up to 40 on March 25 at $19. Hard to have.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 8 m finishing fifth behind Home And Dry at this track over 2150m in a NR 41 to 46 on March 25 at $9.50. Then a handy effort when beaten by 6 m finishing third after being driven well back, behind Outback Queenie at Swan Hill over 2240m in a NR 38 to 44 on March 31 at $7.50. Nice effort last time. Heading the right way now.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over raced in the early and middle stages of the race.

form.formComment: Won three starts back at Charlton over 2100m NR up to 42 on March 15. Last start 4th (Sr1) over 2180m at Kilmore, beaten 9 m by Shiralee (2:43.70) in NR 36 to 40 on April 2 at $11. Respect.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced roughly when placed under pressure near the finish.
Sulky contacted by Clem Mcardle approaching the 300m.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr3) over 2160m after being wide early at Echuca, beaten 25 m by Mussel Shoals (2:40.00) in NR 45 to 50 on April 5 at $81.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 8th (Fr3) over 2160m after being wide early at Echuca, beaten 25 m by Mussel Shoals (2:40.00) in NR 45 to 50 on April 5 at $81.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear racing room entering the home straight.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 6th (Fr1) over 2150m at this track beaten 65 m by Maxbeca (2:38.00) in 0-1 WIN on April 1 at $71. Before that 7th (Fr2) over 2150m at this track, beaten 18 m by Home And Dry (2:38.10) in NR 41 to 46 on March 25 at $31. Unlikely to threaten.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr1) over 2150m at this track, beaten 7 m by Insider Trading (2:36.70) in NR up to 50 on April 1 at $4.80. Before that, 6th (Sr3) over 2150m at this track beaten 11 m by Home And Dry (2:38.10) in NR 41 to 46 on March 25 at $3.10. Doesn't need to improve a great deal to take this out.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr4) over 1650m at this track beaten 2 m by Fake Cullection (1:59.30) in NR up to 40 on March 25 at $7.50. At the start before 8th (Fr3) over 2180m after racing wide at Terang beaten 35 m by Lewielewis (2:39.50) in NR 45 to 50 on January 26 at $151. Got close after breaking last start and could peak now.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait clear of interference inside the final 50m.
Inconvenienced after the start. Gave ground to be beaten 38m into 9th placing.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr2) over 1750m after showing early speed at Swan Hill, at the bell was 4th-7.4 beaten 13 m by Happenstbabeachboy (2:06.10) in NR 45 to 50 on March 31 at $26. At the start before 6th (Fr3) over 2180m after showing early pace at Kilmore, beaten 30 m by Metro Memory (2:43.80) in NR 46 to 49 on March 26 at $4.80. Can do better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Out of position when the start was effected on the second occasion.

form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Last start was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr6) over 1650m at this track was 6th-7.62 at the bell, beaten 9 m by Binalong Night (1:59.10) in NR 43 to 46 on March 18 at $4.80. The run before was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr6) over 2160m at Echuca was 7th-13.9 at the bell, beaten 19 m by Final Bow (2:40.60) in NR 43 to 48 on March 10 at $4. Looking for better.
